description: Formula Genius is an AI tool that generates and validates spreadsheet formulas, SQL queries, regex, and scripts from plain-English prompts. It offers web-based generation workflows for Excel, Google Sheets, SQL, and related automation use cases.
summary: Formula Genius exposes OAuth-protected MCP endpoints at `https://formulagenius.co/mcp` (streamable HTTP) and `https://formulagenius.co/sse` (SSE); no public HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI docs were found.
